quality.description_clarity: High. The description clearly explains the visual effect and mechanical benefit (disadvantage on attack rolls).
quality.completeness: High. Contains all standard spell parameters (level, casting time, range, components, duration, classes).
quality.mechanics_clarity: Clear. The specific immunities (blindsight, truesight) are well-defined, which is excellent for rules resolution.

mechanics.effect: Imposes disadvantage on attack rolls made by creatures relying on sight against the caster.
counter_mechanics: Attacks not relying on sight (e.g., blindsight).
mechanics.resource_cost: 1 Action to cast, Concentration up to 1 minute.
mechanics.balance_assessment: Appropriate for a 2nd-level spell. Provides a significant defensive boost against physical attackers while being bypassed by common counter-senses or divination magic.
